name: @onda/wasm-vello
description: The ONDA Vello (GPU) renderer compiled to WebAssembly — Vello in the browser over WebGPU (no DOM, no Chromium).

scripts.build: cargo build -p onda-wasm-vello --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/onda_wasm_vello.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web
